overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic horror game showing an FBI agent exploring the dimly lit interior of a rustic wooden lodge with stone fireplaces and period furnishings, transitioning to a rainy small town street outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: corner room with large grid windows overlooking exterior

events.description: character walks through doorway from corner room into larger lounge area with stone fireplace

agents.ego_description: walking slowly from the window area toward the interior doorway, observing the rainy exterior through the windows

entered.detail: tall windows with grid panes showing rainy exterior with trees
white metal radiator beneath the windows
dark wood paneled walls with vertical planks
large stone fireplace visible through the doorway

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a corner room of a wooden lodge with large grid windows showing the rainy exterior. The FBI agent walks slowly past a white radiator and dark wood-paneled walls, moving through a doorway into a larger lounge area where a stone fireplace becomes visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: back hallway connecting to kitchen and dining areas

events.description: moves from well-lit lounge into darker narrow hallway
enters kitchen area and dining room with white tablecloths

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow back hallway into the kitchen area, passing wooden pillars and shelving units

notable_agents.action: another agent standing at the kitchen counter, facing away from the camera

entered.detail: wooden counter with various kitchen items and appliances
thick wooden support beams in the hallway
round tables with white tablecloths and wooden chairs

segments.scene_description: The agent moves from the lounge into a darker narrow hallway with wooden pillars, transitioning into a kitchen area with counters and shelving. Another person stands at the kitchen counter in the distance as the character enters a dining area with white tablecloths visible through the doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: dining room with bar counter and ceiling fans

events.description: moves behind the wooden bar counter overlooking the dining area
raises flashlight to examine the window and exterior

agents.ego_description: circling behind the bar counter, shining a flashlight toward the windows, observing another person in the dining area

notable_agents.action: standing near the far fireplace, facing toward the camera

entered.detail: long wooden bar with stools and various bottles
wooden ceiling fan with lights above the dining tables
vintage cash register on the bar counter

segments.scene_description: The agent explores the bar area, moving behind the wooden counter with a vintage cash register. A ceiling fan spins above the dining tables as the character shines a flashlight toward the large windows, examining the exterior while observing another person standing near the distant fireplace.

scene_state.functional_zone: upscale lounge with leather seating and large stone fireplace

events.description: enters lounge area with leather sofas and approaches the stone fireplace
approaches the large stone fireplace with dramatic warm lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through the lounge area, examining the leather furniture and the large stone fireplace, heading toward the exit

entered.detail: brown leather Chesterfield sofas arranged around the room
green ceramic table lamp on wooden side table
wooden coat rack with hanging garments

segments.scene_description: The agent moves into an upscale lounge area with brown leather Chesterfield sofas and a green ceramic table lamp. The character approaches the massive stone fireplace that dominates the room, passing a wooden coat rack while heading toward the exit doors visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy small town main street with wooden boardwalks

events.description: exits the lodge through double doors into the rainy exterior environment
heavy rain and wet street atmosphere, transitioning from warm interior to cool exterior

agents.ego_description: walking out of the lodge onto the wet asphalt street, looking around the rainy small town environment

notable_agents.action: walking away down the rainy street ahead of the character

entered.detail: American flag hanging from the lodge facade
covered wooden pavilion structure across the street
dark sedan parked along the curb
rain-slicked street with puddles reflecting the overcast sky

segments.scene_description: The agent exits the lodge through double doors into a rainy small town street. An American flag hangs from the building as the character steps onto the wet asphalt, passing a parked dark sedan. The atmosphere shifts dramatically from the warm wooden interior to the cool, overcast exterior with a distant pedestrian walking ahead down the road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the warm, dimly lit interior of a rustic wooden lodge that eventually opens onto a cold, rainy town street. It begins in a corner room with grid windows, moving past dark wood-paneled walls and through a doorway into a lounge where a stone fireplace is visible in the distance. As the agent progresses, the scene shifts through a narrow hallway and a kitchen area into a dining space, eventually moving behind a vintage bar counter where a flashlight cuts through the gloom. The camera then glides into an upscale lounge featuring leather Chesterfield sofas and a green ceramic lamp before approaching the massive stone fireplace and heading toward the exit. Finally, the agent passes through double doors and under a hanging American flag, transitioning from the wooden interior to the wet asphalt of an overcast street beside a parked dark sedan.
